executives.name: Kevin G. Hostetler
executives.background: Kevin G. Hostetler has served as our Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since April 2022. Prior to joining Array, Mr. Hostetler served as the Chief Executive Officer at Rotork from 2018 to 2022. Prior to that, he served as Chief Executive Officer of FDH Velocitel and held various executive positions at IDEX Corporation and Ingersoll Rand.

executives.name: Kurt J. Scheuermann
executives.background: Kurt J. Scheuermann has served as our Chief Financial Officer since December 2023. Prior to that, he served as our Interim Chief Financial Officer from October 2023 to December 2023 and as our Vice President, General Counsel and Secretary since October 2020. Before joining Array, Mr. Scheuermann was a partner at the law firm of Kirkland & Ellis LLP.

executives.name: Neil P. Manning
executives.background: Neil P. Manning has served as our Chief Operations Officer since January 2023. Prior to joining Array, Mr. Manning served as President of the Industrial Products Division at AMETEK, Inc. from 2017 to 2022. He also held various leadership roles at IDEX Corporation.

executives.name: Erica Brinker
executives.background: Erica Brinker has served as our Chief Commercial Officer since March 2022. Prior to joining Array, Ms. Brinker served as Chief Marketing Officer and Vice President of Commercial Excellence at Honeywell from 2019 to 2022.

board_of_directors.name: Bradford T. Child
board_of_directors.background: Bradford T. Child has served as a member of our Board since October 2020 and as Chairman since May 2022. Mr. Child is a Managing Director at Blackstone in the Private Equity Group.

board_of_directors.name: Kevin G. Hostetler
board_of_directors.background: Kevin G. Hostetler has served as our Chief Executive Officer and as a member of our Board since April 2022.

board_of_directors.name: Paulo Almirante
board_of_directors.background: Paulo Almirante has served as a member of our Board since May 2022. He is the Senior Executive Vice President of ENGIE, in charge of Renewables, Energy Management and Nuclear activities.

board_of_directors.name: Troy Alstead
board_of_directors.background: Troy Alstead has served as a member of our Board since March 2021. Mr. Alstead previously served as Chief Operating Officer of Starbucks Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Bilal Khan
board_of_directors.background: Bilal Khan has served as a member of our Board since October 2020. Mr. Khan is a Senior Managing Director at Blackstone in the Private Equity Group.

board_of_directors.name: Gerard J. DeMuro
board_of_directors.background: Gerard J. DeMuro has served as a member of our Board since June 2021. Mr. DeMuro previously served as President and CEO of BAE Systems, Inc.
